gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; furthermore, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; healthcare providers also showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; furthermore, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
